Terms Privacy Support

Legal

Terms of Service
& Privacy Policy

The agreement that governs your use of StarStore, and how we handle the information you share with us.

Last updated: April 24, 2026 Contact us

On this page

Overview Terms of Service — Accounts — Payments — Refunds — Prohibited use — Liability Privacy Policy — Data collected — How we use it — Sharing — Your rights — Security Changes Contact

01 — Overview

A short summary

StarStore is a service that helps you buy, gift, and sell Telegram Stars and Telegram Premium subscriptions. By using StarStore you agree to the Terms below and to the Privacy Policy that follows. We try to keep both as plain as possible — if anything is unclear, please get in touch.

02 — Terms of Service

Terms of Service

These Terms govern your access to and use of StarStore. By using the service you accept them in full. If you don't agree, please do not use StarStore.

Accounts & eligibility

  • You must be at least 13 years old (or the age of digital consent in your country) to use StarStore.
  • You are responsible for keeping your Telegram account and any wallet credentials secure.
  • You must provide accurate information when placing an order or requesting a payout.

Payments & pricing

Prices are shown in USDT and may fluctuate based on market rates. Orders are processed once payment is confirmed on the blockchain. Network fees are paid by the user and are not refundable.

Refunds

Because Telegram Stars and Premium subscriptions are delivered to your account instantly and cannot be reclaimed, all sales are final once the order is fulfilled. If your order fails or is not delivered within a reasonable time, you may request a full refund through support.

Prohibited use

  • Fraud, chargebacks, money laundering, or any unlawful activity.
  • Reselling stolen or unauthorized Telegram Stars.
  • Using StarStore to harass, deceive, or harm another person.
  • Attempting to disrupt the service, scrape it, or circumvent rate limits.

We reserve the right to suspend or close any account that violates these rules.

Liability

StarStore is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential losses, for any failure of Telegram or blockchain infrastructure, or for transactions sent to incorrect wallet addresses by the user.

03 — Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

We collect only what we need to operate the service and we never sell your data. This section explains what we collect, why, and the choices you have.

What we collect

  • Telegram identity: your Telegram user ID, username, and language preference, used to authenticate you and deliver your order.
  • Order data: packages purchased, recipient details, transaction hashes, and timestamps.
  • Wallet addresses: the address you use to pay or receive funds.
  • Technical data: approximate location, device type, and browser version, used for fraud prevention and service quality.

How we use it

  • To process and deliver your orders.
  • To prevent fraud, abuse, and rate-limit violations.
  • To provide customer support and respond to your messages.
  • To improve the service and fix bugs.

Sharing

We share data only with infrastructure providers who help us run StarStore (hosting, analytics, blockchain APIs, support tooling) and only as needed to deliver the service. We do not sell personal data to third parties.

Your rights

Depending on where you live, you may have the right to access, correct, export, or delete personal data we hold about you. To make a request, contact us using the details below and we will respond within a reasonable time.

Security

We use HTTPS in transit, restrict access to production systems, and review our infrastructure regularly. No system is perfectly secure, so please use a strong Telegram password and keep your devices updated.

04 — Changes

Changes to this document

We may update these Terms and the Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will update the date at the top of this page. Continued use of StarStore after changes take effect means you accept the updated document.

05 — Contact

Get in touch

Questions, concerns, or data requests? Reach us through any of the channels below.

Live chat

Open support
